name: test_should_datetime_into_date_time[datetime({year: 1984, month: 10, day: 11, hour: 12, timezone: 'Europe/Stockholm'})-{datetime: other, day: 28, second: 42}-'1984-10-28T12:00:42+01:00[Europe/Stockholm]']

parameters.name: _pytest_bdd_example
parameters.value: {'other': "datetime({year: 1984, month: 10, day: 11, hour: 12, timezone: 'Europe/Stockholm'})", 'expression': '{datetime: other, day: 28, second: 42}', 'result': "'1984-10-28T12:00:42+01:00[Europe/Stockholm]'"}
